title: Senior Data Engineer
summary: Design and build reliable data pipelines, warehouse models, quality checks, and analytics foundations for enterprise clients.
responsibilities: Architect ingestion, transformation, orchestration, and quality patterns
Collaborate with analysts, architects, and client stakeholders
Document lineage, ownership, and operational runbooks
requirements: Hands-on work with Snowflake, Databricks, dbt, Airflow, or similar tools
Ability to reason clearly about data quality and business definitions

title: Frontend Engineer
summary: Build accessible, performant, enterprise-grade interfaces for software products, portals, and analytics experiences.
responsibilities: Develop reusable React and TypeScript components
Translate product and design intent into precise interfaces
Maintain accessibility, performance, and code quality standards
requirements: Strong React, TypeScript, and CSS fundamentals
Experience with Next.js and component systems
Care for visual details, interaction states, and accessibility

title: AI Solutions Consultant
summary: Shape AI, LLM, RAG, and automation opportunities into practical solutions that clients can evaluate and operate.
responsibilities: Assess AI readiness, use-case value, and implementation risk
Design RAG, agent, and workflow automation patterns
Partner with engineering teams on prototypes and production pilots
requirements: Understanding of LLM applications and enterprise data constraints
Strong communication and solution design skills
Experience with Python, APIs, vector databases, or automation tools

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
summary: Create trusted KPI models, dashboards, and data narratives for executive and operational decision-making.
responsibilities: Translate business questions into governed metrics and visual products
Support adoption through documentation and stakeholder enablement
requirements: Advanced SQL and BI tool experience
Ability to define metrics with business stakeholders
Strong visual judgment and attention to analytical clarity
